title: Razorpay UPI Business Config
description: Business-level configuration for the com.razorpay.upi payment handler (UPI Intent flow). Declared in the business's UCP profile at /.well-known/ucp.

environment.description: Razorpay API environment. Use 'sandbox' for test mode (key_id starts with rzp_test_), 'production' for live mode (key_id starts with rzp_live_).

key_id.description: Razorpay public API key (rzp_test_* or rzp_live_*). Safe to advertise in the UCP profile. The key_secret MUST remain on the business backend and MUST NOT be included here.

merchant_name.description: Business display name shown to the buyer during the UPI payment flow.
